import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/testgen.db'\)
cursor = conn.cursor\(\)
cursor.execute\('SELECT name, template_type, template FROM prompt_templates WHERE template_type = \\"requirement_analysis\\"'\)
row = cursor.fetchone\(\)
if row:
    print\(f'=== {row[0]} \({row[1]}\) ==='\)
    print\(row[2]\)
else:
    print\('No requirement_analysis template found'\)
conn.close\(\)
")

import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('test_cases_20260429_142451.xlsx'\)
ws = wb.active
print\('Sheet name:', ws.title\)
print\('Columns:', [cell.value for cell in ws[1]]\)
print\('Total rows \(excluding header\):', ws.max_row - 1\)
print\(\)
for row_idx in range\(2, ws.max_row + 1\):
    row_data = {}
    for col_idx in range\(1, ws.max_column + 1\):
        header = ws.cell\(row=1, col_idx\).value
        value = ws.cell\(row=row_idx, col_idx\).value
        row_data[header] = value
    print\(f'=== Row {row_idx-1} ==='\)
    for k, v in row_data.items\(\):
        if v is not None:
            print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('test_cases_20260429_142451.xlsx'\)
ws = wb.active
print\('Sheet:', ws.title\)
headers = []
for col in range\(1, ws.max_column + 1\):
    headers.append\(ws.cell\(row=1, column=col\).value\)
print\('Columns:', headers\)
print\('Rows:', ws.max_row - 1\)
print\(\)
for row_idx in range\(2, ws.max_row + 1\):
    row_data = {}
    for col_idx in range\(1, ws.max_column + 1\):
        val = ws.cell\(row=row_idx, column=col_idx\).value
        row_data[headers[col_idx - 1]] = val
    print\(f'=== Case {row_idx - 1} ==='\)
    for k, v in row_data.items\(\):
        if v is not None:
            print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)
    print\(\)
")
